ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "brand_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "brand_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL for a representative image of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_category_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_parent_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category the size chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL for a visual representation of the size chart */,
  "chart_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "chart_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK dress size */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US dress size */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU dress size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., dress, top, bottom) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL for the product image */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "product_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "product_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart used for the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., UK 8, US 4, EU 36) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity for the specific size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., dress, top, bottom) */,
  "size_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_stock_alert_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alerts */,
  "size_last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "measurement_bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "measurement_waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "measurement_hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "customer_last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., customer service, AI) */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "recommendation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
